definitions.arpu: Average Revenue Per Paying User - Netflix's own reported metric, typically found in MD&A operational highlights section. This is NOT total revenue divided by subscribers due to revenue recognition timing, FX adjustments, and subscription mix effects.

arpu_2024.unit: USD per user per month or quarter
arpu_2024.label: Netflix ARPU for fiscal year 2024

c87b9e56dd291521da2f8c45a2619dd3.plan: Find AMD's quarterly revenue guidance ranges for Q2 2024, Q3 2024, Q4 2024, and Q1 2025, then calculate the range as percentage of midpoint for each

clarifications.company: Advanced Micro Devices Inc, ticker AMD, CIK 0000002488
clarifications.period: Q2 2024, Q3 2024, Q4 2024, and Q1 2025 guidance ranges
clarifications.formula: Range % = ((High - Low) / Midpoint) * 100, where Midpoint = (High + Low) / 2
clarifications.source_strategy: Q1 2024 earnings press release for Q2 2024 guidance, Q2 2024 earnings press release for Q3 2024 guidance, Q3 2024 earnings press release for Q4 2024 guidance, Q4 2024 earnings press release for Q1 2025 guidance

definitions.guidance_range: Management's forward-looking revenue guidance expressed as low to high dollar amounts
definitions.range_percentage: The spread between high and low guidance expressed as percentage of the midpoint

filings_needed.reason: Q1 2024 earnings results with Q2 2024 guidance
Q2 2024 earnings results with Q3 2024 guidance
Q3 2024 earnings results with Q4 2024 guidance
Q4 2024 earnings results with Q1 2025 guidance

93d79f4b28ce15bb0aa10e3d06ece416.plan: Project BROS 2026 gross profit using 30% revenue CAGR and 500bp gross margin compression from YE 2024

clarifications.period: YE 2024 baseline for revenue and gross margin, project to 2026
clarifications.formula: 2026 Gross Profit = 2026 Revenue × 2026 Gross Margin, where 2026 Revenue = 2024 Revenue × (1.30)^2 and 2026 Gross Margin = 2024 Gross Margin - 5.00%
clarifications.source_strategy: Use XBRL for 2024 annual revenue and gross profit to calculate baseline gross margin, then apply growth and compression assumptions

definitions.30% CAGR: Compound annual growth rate of 30% applied for 2 years (2024 to 2026)
definitions.500bps compression: Gross margin decreases by 5.00 percentage points from 2024 baseline

filings_needed.reason: BROS FY2024 annual revenue for baseline projection
BROS FY2024 annual gross profit to calculate baseline gross margin

90882f4090a2b209e828adf81d2f1c73.plan: Calculate the net income impact if all Boeing debt were refinanced at 3% higher interest rates

clarifications.company: The Boeing Company, ticker BA, CIK 0000012927
clarifications.period: FY2024 (most recent completed fiscal year)
clarifications.formula: Net Income Impact = -(Additional Interest Expense) × (1 - Tax Rate)
clarifications.source_strategy: 2024 10-K debt footnote for total refinanceable debt and current weighted average rates, tax footnote for effective tax rate, XBRL for current net income baseline

definitions.refinanceable_debt: Only interest-bearing borrowings (bonds, notes, term loans, credit facilities) - excludes operating leases, pension obligations, and other non-interest bearing liabilities that appear in total debt
definitions.tax_shield: Additional interest expense reduces taxable income, so after-tax impact = additional interest × (1 - tax rate)

total_refinanceable_debt.label: Total interest-bearing debt outstanding from debt footnote (bonds, notes, term loans)

current_weighted_avg_rate.label: Current weighted average interest rate on debt portfolio

effective_tax_rate.label: FY2024 effective tax rate for calculating tax shield on additional interest

baseline_net_income.label: FY2024 net income for calculating percentage impact

filings_needed.reason: Total refinanceable debt outstanding and current interest rates
Effective tax rate for calculating tax shield on additional interest expense
FY2024 net income baseline for percentage impact calculation
